name: Remineralizing Clay Toothpaste
description: A mineral-rich, fluoride-free toothpaste that neutralizes cavity-causing acids and delivers bioavailable minerals to tooth enamel.
effectivenessNote: Matches/exceeds commercial for cleaning, whitening, remineralization. -2 because fluoride paste has stronger cavity-prevention evidence for high-risk individuals.
warnings: No fluoride — consider fluoride rinse if cavity-prone
Must use non-metal utensils with bentonite clay
Shorter shelf life than commercial (1–2 months vs years)
Clay can clog drains — spit in trash or toilet
scienceNote: Cavity bacteria produce acid dissolving enamel. Baking soda neutralizes acid. Clay delivers remineralizing minerals. Salt creates inhospitable osmotic environment. Together they address root causes.
